data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for QR code generation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for QR code generation for physical distribution. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of QR code generation. The linked use case mentions this need, but without direct evidence, the requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of QR code generation functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of QR code generation.
